relations.subject: Creamy-bellied antwren
relations.evidence: It inhabits it interior and edges of humid montane forest where it favors areas with tall trees and much moss and epiphytes
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Creamy-bellied antwren
relations.evidence: "The primary threat to this species is accelerating deforestation in its range as forests are logged for conversion into pastures and agriculture cultivation." It is considered uncommon to locally fairly common
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
